positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u31,negated_conjecture,
    bile_duct_cancer(colorectal_cancer)).

cnf(u36,axiom,
    ~low_survival_rate(colorectal_cancer)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~cholangiocarcinoma(X0) | bile_duct_cancer(X0)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    bile_duct_cancer != colorectal_cancer).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~deadly_disease(X0) | low_survival_rate(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    severe_cancer(bile_duct_cancer)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~severe_cancer(X0) | deadly_disease(X0)).

cnf(u39,axiom,
    low_survival_rate(bile_duct_cancer)).

cnf(u38,axiom,
    deadly_disease(bile_duct_cancer)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define mild_flu(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
